WHO WE ARE

138+ Clients. 12+ Industries. Six Years of Engineering Excellence.

Built in the AI era. Not retrofitted for it. Traditional IT agencies are bloated, slow, and expensive by design. Trai Inc is an AI-native engineering team that ships Silicon Valley-grade custom software in weeks, not months. Lean architecture, rapid execution, zero bloat. Transparent pricing, not quote-only mystery. Since 2020, we've delivered solutions for 138+ clients across 12+ industries.

138+

Clients Served

6+

Years in Business

12+

Industries Covered

50+

Enterprise Projects

HOW WE WORK

AI-Native Delivery at Scale

We combine deep engineering expertise with AI-powered development tools to deliver faster, cleaner, and more cost-effective solutions than traditional agencies. Every project gets a dedicated team lead, transparent sprint updates, and direct access to the engineers building your product.

⚡

Dedicated Team

Every project is assigned a dedicated team lead and engineering resources. You get direct access to the people building your product.

🧠

AI-Augmented Speed

Our team uses AI development tools — Claude, Gemini, and agentic coding workflows — to deliver enterprise-quality work in half the time of traditional agencies.

💰

Fixed-Price Transparency

Every project is scoped upfront with a fixed price. No hourly billing, no surprise invoices, no scope creep negotiations.

🔒

Full IP Ownership

You own 100% of the code, design assets, and infrastructure. Complete handover with documentation. Zero vendor lock-in.

OUR CAPABILITIES

Full-Spectrum Engineering & Digital Services

💻

Custom Software & Web Apps

Full-stack web platforms, SaaS products, admin dashboards, and enterprise tools built with React, Next.js, Node.js, and Python.

📱

Mobile App Development

Native and cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android using Flutter and React Native.

🤖

AI, Automation & Chatbots

Custom AI agents, WhatsApp Business API integration, workflow automation with n8n, and intelligent chatbots powered by LLMs.

☁️

Cloud & DevOps

Cloud migrations, serverless architecture, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure on AWS, Cloudflare, Firebase, and Vercel.

🎨

UI/UX & Brand Design

User research, wireframing, prototyping in Figma, brand identity systems, motion graphics, and presentation design.

📈

Digital Marketing & SEO

Local SEO, Google and Meta Ads, social media strategy, content marketing, email automation, and lead generation funnels.

⚙️

Enterprise Platforms

Custom CRM, ERP, HRMS, and project management systems tailored to your business workflows with real-time analytics.

🔒

Cybersecurity & Compliance

Security audits, penetration testing, zero-trust architecture, and compliance frameworks for SOC 2, GDPR, and data protection.

OUR JOURNEY

Six Years of Building

2020

Founded Trai Inc

Launched as a digital marketing and software development firm in Lucknow, serving local businesses and startups.

2021

Scaled to 50+ Clients

Expanded service offerings and team. Delivered websites, marketing campaigns, and software across hospitality, retail, and real estate.

2022-23

Enterprise & International Expansion

Took on enterprise clients and expanded to international markets including the UK. Crossed 100+ total projects delivered.

2024

AI-Native Transformation

Adopted AI-augmented development workflows across the team. Integrated Claude, Gemini, and agentic coding tools into daily operations.

2025-26

138+ Clients & Product Launch

Crossed 138+ clients served. Began developing a proprietary SaaS product to scale the tools and systems that power client delivery.

TALENT DEVELOPMENT

Intern Incubator Program

We run an active intern incubation program training the next generation of engineers and marketers. Interns work on real client projects from day one, learning production-grade development, AI-native workflows, and professional delivery under mentorship from our senior team.

QUESTIONS & ANSWERS

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does an MVP take to build?

Our senior engineers work in rapid sprints, and we typically deliver a complete, launch-ready MVP in 4 to 8 weeks depending on the complexity of the requirements.

What is the typical cost for a custom software project?

For standard scopes like web applications or internal CRMs, pricing generally ranges from ₹2-8L depending on scope. For fully bespoke enterprise solutions, we provide a quote-based estimate after a scoping call.

Are you the best software development company in Lucknow?

We believe our results speak for themselves. We bring Silicon Valley-grade engineering to Indian MSMEs across the country without the bloat of traditional IT agencies. We focus purely on lean architecture and rapid execution.

How do I know I'll actually own my app or software?

We believe in complete transparency. We've published a due-diligence checklist covering code ownership, app store accounts, and hosting. We assign full source code and IP to you upon final payment, and give you direct access to all infrastructure.

Ready to Build Something Exceptional?

Tell us about your project. Our team will scope it and deliver a fixed-price proposal within 48 hours.
